# Extracao: transcription_mp4_14__Trait_13_-_Great_Salespeople_never_give_up_on_unsold_client

- **Fonte:** transcription_mp4_14__Trait_13_-_Great_Salespeople_never_give_up_on_unsold_client.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

The great salespeople never give up on unsold clients. They're certain. They're absolutely convinced that someday the unsold will become a client. This takes work. I'm telling you it's difficult because you start thinking lost sale means no way ever. But if you can make that transition and start thinking the way the greats do, they continue to follow up on the unsold knowing, hey I invested the last three months in this client. They went with somebody else. I need to keep investing time. It's difficult to do but being great is difficult. Consider the lost sale not as something lost but as an investment made that hasn't paid off yet. It's a great way to differentiate yourself in the marketplace by continuing to follow up even on those lost sales. That future investment in your future, your business, so you too can be great.
